title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
